notes: Shadow-only Phase 8 watch-list basket for forward observation.
This file intentionally excludes BEL_BROAD1_K7 because Belmont has no current forward races and is dormant until the track produces new qualifying data.
Use this for logging research challengers alongside the primary paper basket, not as the default current-paper portfolio.
No unsupported track aliasing is applied. BAQ is not treated as BEL.

rules.plain_english: Oaklawn Park, race 9+, 11-12 runners, favorite at least 25% implied win probability, favorite-second gap at least 5%, play Key-1-with-7.
Aqueduct, race 9+, 10-11 runners, favorite-second gap at least 22%, play Key-1-with-9.
Santa Anita Park, race 9+, fast/Firm conditions, 11-12 runners, favorite-second gap at least 20%, play Key-1-with-9.
Keeneland, 12-14 runners, fast/Firm conditions, favorite at least 35% implied win probability, favorite-second gap at least 5%, play Key-1-with-9.
Churchill Downs, race 7+, 11-12 runners, favorite at least 30% implied win probability, play Key-1-with-9.
Del Mar, race 5+, September-November only, 10-11 runners, favorite-second gap at least 10%, play Key-1-with-7.
